ddls:
CREATE TABLE "congressional_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the congressional district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the district belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the congressional district the county belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES congressional_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the voter is registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered */,
  "last_voted_date" TEXT /* Date the voter last voted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the registration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "registration_method" TEXT /* Method of registration (e.g., online, in-person, mail) */,
  "voter_history_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter's voting history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_voter_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_history_id") REFERENCES voter_history ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the voter */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the voter */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the voter (encrypted) */,
  "voter_status" TEXT /* Current status of the voter (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the voter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the election */,
  "voter_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Overall turnout percentage for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "voters_turned_out" INTEGER /* Number of voters who turned out for the election */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of voters who turned out */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of voters who turned out */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of voters who turned out */,
  "political_affiliation_distribution" TEXT /* Political affiliation distribution of voters who turned out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting history record */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the voter voted in the election */,
  "vote_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, mail, absentee) */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot used (e.g., standard, provisional, absentee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_history_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_history_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, official) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
